title: forsythia suspensa var. pubescens
intro: Forsythia suspensa var. pubescens, also known as Che Qian Cao, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Oleaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Forsythia suspensa var. pubescens is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Forsythia suspensa var. pubescens is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
